overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban fringe area during golden hour. The scene features scattered trash piles, palm trees, a large spherical stadium structure, and futuristic skyscrapers in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban fringe path with billboard and trash accumulation

events.description: child runs across the path from left to right in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path past a large trash pile, heading toward the sun

notable_agents.action: child running across the path from left to right

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard with illuminated text and graphics
large mound of garbage bags in blue and black colors
tall palm trees lining the dirt path
partially constructed or damaged building with exposed framework

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dystopian urban fringe path during golden hour, with a large digital billboard on the left and a substantial trash pile on the right. The camera follows a character walking forward along a dirt trail lined with palm trees toward a damaged building in the distance. A child runs across the path midway through the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open area approaching spherical stadium structure

events.description: large spherical lattice stadium structure enters view on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the path as the landscape opens up to reveal a massive spherical structure

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking in the same direction ahead on the path

entered.detail: massive white lattice spherical structure resembling a stadium or arena
futuristic skyscraper with the number 07 visible on its facade

segments.scene_description: As the character moves forward, the billboard falls behind and a massive spherical stadium structure comes into view on the right. The path continues through sparse vegetation with scattered trash piles, while a futuristic glass tower with '07' marking becomes visible in the distance ahead. More pedestrians appear in the mid-ground walking along the same route.

scene_state.functional_zone: perimeter of spherical stadium with scattered debris

events.description: passing a large accumulation of trash bags and debris on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the spherical stadium structure, navigating around scattered trash and vegetation

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt and shorts walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: bright purple and yellow automated vending machine
curved elevated roadway structure in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the massive spherical stadium, which now dominates the left side of the frame. The path is littered with trash piles and debris, while dry vegetation grows between the cracks. A distinctive purple vending machine and an elevated highway ramp become visible on the right as the glass tower with '07' grows larger ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban approach to downtown towers with vending kiosk

events.description: approaching the purple vending machine and transitioning to more paved urban surface

agents.ego_description: approaching the city center area with tall buildings, passing other pedestrians in matching red outfits

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians wearing red shirts and shorts walking toward the city center

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the urban core, with the tall glass tower marked '07' now looming large ahead. The spherical stadium recedes into the left background while the purple vending machine becomes prominent on the right. The ground transitions to asphalt as the character moves through a more densely populated area with other pedestrians heading toward the futuristic city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dystopian urban fringe that gradually transitions into a densely populated futuristic city center. It begins on a dirt trail during golden hour, moving past a large digital billboard and trash piles while a child runs across the path toward a damaged building. As the character advances, the billboard recedes and a massive spherical stadium emerges on the right, while the terrain remains sparse with scattered debris and pedestrians appearing in the mid-ground. The scene then shifts as the stadium begins to dominate the left side of the frame, leading the camera past a purple vending machine and an elevated highway ramp toward a looming glass tower marked 07. Finally, the ground transitions from dirt to asphalt as the stadium recedes into the background and the character enters the urban core, moving among a crowd of people toward the towering skyscrapers.
